examples: Objectives To investigate the effect of the treatment of biliary ascarid with duodenoscopy.
The results showed that the rate of the intestinal nematode infection is 13.79%, all are ascarid. The rate of pinworm infection is 8.87%.
Results The child gastritis and peptic ulcer were easily misdiagnosed as bowel ascarid, gastroenteritis, dyspepsia, even mesentery scrofula etc.
